title: Idol Expression Lock
description: A reference-dependent series of 9:16 Korean-idol-style portrait sheets preserving the same face through nine expressions and later styling variations.
creative_direction: Identity-lock portrait sheet series: image 01 establishes the subject's face, hair, crop logic, and 3x3 grid; images 02-04 depend on it while varying lighting, styling, and mood.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for 02-04. Queue may run 02-04 concurrently after 01 is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Idol Expression Lock
en.description: A reference-dependent series of 9:16 Korean-idol-style portrait sheets preserving the same face through nine expressions and later styling variations.

zh-CN.title: 偶像表情一致性
zh-CN.description: 一组依赖参考图的 9:16 韩系偶像写真九宫格,在九种表情和后续造型变化中保持同一张脸。
